tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service "Ineersa\CodingAgent\Auth\CodexAuthRecord": argument "$access" of method "__construct()" is type-hinted "string", you should configure its value explicitly.

tag.name: console.command
tag.description: Agent session — TUI (default) or headless JSONL runtime

tag.name: console.command
tag.description: Authenticate with OpenAI Codex subscription (OAuth PKCE)

tag.name: console.command
tag.description: Rebuild the file mention completion index for the current project.

call.argument: Rebuild the file mention completion index for the current project.

tag.name: console.command
tag.description: List log files with size and modification date

tag.name: console.command
tag.description: Search log entries across all log files

call.argument: List all dotenv files with variables and values
Display information about the current project
Install bundle's web assets under a public directory
Invalidate cache tags for all or a specific pool
Delete an item from a cache pool
Dump the current configuration for an extension
Dump the default configuration for an extension
Display current services for an application
Ensure that arguments injected into services match type declarations
List classes/interfaces you can use for autowiring
Display configured listeners for an application
Prepare the required infrastructure for the transport
List messages you can dispatch using the message buses
Stop workers after their current message
Show the message count for one or more transports
List schedules and their recurring messages
Lint a YAML file and outputs encountered errors
Set a secret in the vault
Remove a secret from the vault
Reveal the value of a secret
Decrypt all secrets and stores them in the local vault
Encrypt all local secrets to the vault
Dump error pages to plain HTML files that can be directly served by a web server

service.argument: Please set the "framework.uid.name_based_uuid_namespace" configuration option to use the "name_based_uuid.factory" service

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Invalid service "messenger.transport.sqs.factory": class "Symfony\Component\Messenger\Bridge\AmazonSqs\Transport\AmazonSqsTransportFactory" does not exist.

call.argument: Generate a migration by comparing your current database to your mapping information.
Ensures that the metadata storage is at the latest version.
Display a list of all available migrations and their status.
Dump the schema for your database to a migration.
Execute one or more migration versions up or down manually.
Execute a migration to a specified version or the latest available version.
Rollup migrations by deleting all tracked versions and insert the one version that exists.
View the status of a set of migrations.
Tells you if your schema is up-to-date.
Manually add and delete migration versions from the version table.
Agent session — TUI (default) or headless JSONL runtime

service.argument: Agent session — TUI (default) or headless JSONL runtime

call.argument: Authenticate with OpenAI Codex subscription (OAuth PKCE)

service.argument: Authenticate with OpenAI Codex subscription (OAuth PKCE)
Rebuild the file mention completion index for the current project.

call.argument: List log files with size and modification date

service.argument: List log files with size and modification date

call.argument: Search log entries across all log files

service.argument: Search log entries across all log files
List all dotenv files with variables and values
Display information about the current project
Install bundle's web assets under a public directory
Invalidate cache tags for all or a specific pool
Delete an item from a cache pool
Dump the current configuration for an extension
Dump the default configuration for an extension
Display current services for an application
Ensure that arguments injected into services match type declarations
List classes/interfaces you can use for autowiring
Display configured listeners for an application
Prepare the required infrastructure for the transport
List messages you can dispatch using the message buses
Stop workers after their current message
Show the message count for one or more transports
List schedules and their recurring messages
Lint a YAML file and outputs encountered errors
Set a secret in the vault
Remove a secret from the vault
Reveal the value of a secret
Decrypt all secrets and stores them in the local vault
Encrypt all local secrets to the vault
Dump error pages to plain HTML files that can be directly served by a web server
Generate a migration by comparing your current database to your mapping information.
Ensures that the metadata storage is at the latest version.
Display a list of all available migrations and their status.
Dump the schema for your database to a migration.
Execute one or more migration versions up or down manually.
Execute a migration to a specified version or the latest available version.
Rollup migrations by deleting all tracked versions and insert the one version that exists.
View the status of a set of migrations.
Tells you if your schema is up-to-date.
